title: hieracium murorum subsp. radiatellum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. radiatellum, also known as Hieracium radiatellum, is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Hawkweed plant. It is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family and is primarily found in mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. radiatellum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. radiatellum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves.
